description_long: This is an adult human figure depicted in a dynamic walking pose, with one leg forward and one arm swinging back, suggesting motion. The figure is dressed in a fitted long-sleeve top and flared pants, both of which have a sleek, modern style. The clothing appears to be form-fitting and athletic, with a clear separation between the upper and lower garments. The figure's shoes are distinct and appear to be athletic sneakers, providing a sporty look. The head is sculpted with short hair, and the overall build is lean and proportional, typical of an adult pedestrian. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the figure's posture is upright and active.
description: An adult figure in a dynamic walking pose, wearing fitted athletic clothing and sneakers, with short hair and no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and forward-swinging arm and leg.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile, arm swing, and leg stride.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back, trailing arm, and the back of the legs.
description_view_3: Right side view with the opposite profile and visible stride.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic long-sleeve top and flared pants
